selected.angle: The founding fact of the chronicle: what launched, when, and on whose record.
How operational habit hardened into the platform's intake path — reported with its evidentiary limits visible.
The chronicle's first archive-gap story: the platform survived an outage its own record cannot explain.

omitted.reason: The CI-growth story needs usage data the current corpus does not contain; running it now would force unsupported quantitative claims.

coverage_rationale: One firm founding story, one qualified institutional story, and one archive-gap story give the first issue an honest cross-section: what the record establishes, what it only suggests, and what it has already lost. The CI story defers until usage data exists.
